risks.risk: Visual identity degraded too much during performance edits.
risks.mitigation: Use bounded effect reductions and preserve zone semantics/colors.
risks.rollback_condition: Revert effect changes if identity/readability drops below Owner acceptance.
risks.stop_condition: Stop slice if identity collapse is observed.

risks.risk: FPS improves only by disabling meaningful UI behavior.
risks.mitigation: Require truth overlay/API/interaction acceptance checks with FPS checks.
risks.rollback_condition: Rollback any change that removes essential observability.
risks.stop_condition: Stop on any attempt to achieve FPS by making UI empty/useless.

risks.risk: Route or API truth breaks while optimizing front-end pressure.
risks.mitigation: Hard gate on 200 + HTML/CSS/JS/API pass + failed requests = 0.
risks.stop_condition: Stop if required requests fail or API checks fail.

risks.risk: JS state/click behavior breaks after loop/throttle refactor.
risks.mitigation: Small reversible edits with explicit interaction smoke checklist.
risks.rollback_condition: Rollback batch/timer changes on behavior regression.
risks.stop_condition: Stop slice if interaction reliability regresses.

risks.risk: Reduced-motion/performance mode toggle exists but does not reduce real workload.
risks.mitigation: Measure active animation/timer counts before and after mode toggle.
risks.rollback_condition: Remove/redo toggle implementation if no measurable effect.
risks.stop_condition: Stop acceptance if toggle effect is non-functional.

risks.risk: Single-run measurement noise misleads optimization decisions.
risks.mitigation: Use repeated runs and median-oriented interpretation.
risks.rollback_condition: Defer conclusions if results fluctuate without stable trend.
risks.stop_condition: Stop claiming gains without repeated evidence.

risks.risk: No measurable improvement after slice implementation.
risks.mitigation: Predefine slice hypotheses and escalate to next slice only with evidence.
risks.rollback_condition: Rollback low-value edits and prioritize next hypothesis slice.
risks.stop_condition: Stop broad edits if slice yields no improvement and root cause remains unknown.

rollback_conditions_global: No measurable gain with added complexity
stop_conditions_global: Attempt to trade truth for synthetic FPS gain
Uncontrolled scope expansion across forbidden paths
